description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk constructed from dark metal panels, each joined with prominent rivets that run in rows along its surface. The structure is angular and tapers to a sharp point at the top, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. The obelisk is mounted on a square metal base, which is set into a circular patch of textured ground that appears to be soil with scattered patches of grass and small flowers. One face of the obelisk features an engraved inscription, which is visible but not fully legible from the images. The overall design is minimalist, with the only ornamentation being the rivet pattern and the engraved text. The setting suggests it is intended as a commemorative or decorative monument in an urban park or public space.
description: A tall, dark metal obelisk with riveted panels and an engraved inscription, mounted on a square base set in a circular patch of soil with grass and flowers.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from an angle highlighting the riveted metal panels and the engraved inscription on its front face, with the base and surrounding soil clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the obelisk from the side, emphasizing the verticality and the rivet pattern, with less visibility of the inscription.
description_view_2: A rear angle reveals the sharp taper of the obelisk and the continuation of the rivet pattern, with the base and surrounding ground in view.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the obelisk is visible, showing a plain metal surface with rivets and the square base embedded in the circular ground patch.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription on the front face of the obelisk, located in the upper-middle section. The text appears to be in English, rendered in a sans-serif font, but is not fully legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Rows of prominent metal rivets run along the surface of the obelisk, forming a geometric pattern. No other decorative motifs or carvings are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple square metal plate, slightly raised above the surrounding ground, and is set into a circular patch of textured soil with grass and small flowers. The base appears functional and unadorned.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is sharply pointed and maintains the same dark metal finish as the rest of the structure, with no additional decoration or embellishment.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a circular patch of soil featuring scattered grass and small red flowers. No other notable features such as fences or statues are present.
